scripts.build: node -e "console.log('desktop shell — run npm run build:desktop from repo root')"
scripts.pack: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.pack:dir: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npx electron-builder --win dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.publish:win: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish always
